**Package name**
`@howdoi-cli/<name>`

**What domain does it cover?**
(e.g. Kubernetes, Vim, tmux, AWS CLI)

**Why does it belong in the official org?**
(broad developer usefulness, not too niche)

**Are you willing to contribute the initial YAML data?**
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No, just suggesting
